title: Method of distribution
doc_html:
§207.  Method of distribution

The distribution authorized in R.S. 24:206 shall be made through the office of the secretary of state within a reasonable time after the printed sets of materials have been made available for distribution.  

Added by Acts 1954, No. 50, §1.
doc_text:
§207.  Method of distribution
The distribution authorized in R.S. 24:206 shall be made through the office of the secretary of state within a reasonable time after the printed sets of materials have been made available for distribution.
Added by Acts 1954, No. 50, §1.
